name: dev-core
description: Codex-native development entrypoints and orchestration for design planning, branch/worktree execution, TDD, debugging, review, refactoring, E2E, verification, and continuous learning.

interface.shortDescription: TDD, verification, review, and architecture workflows.
interface.longDescription: Dev Core packages Codex-native entrypoint skills for design planning, plan execution, TDD, debugging, review, refactoring, Playwright E2E, checkpoints, verification loops, frontend and backend architecture patterns, and continuous improvement. Narrow skills trigger day-to-day workflows while dev-workflow keeps shared orchestration gates, branch/worktree preparation, subagent delegation policy, review/refactor loops, and evidence rules centralized.
defaultPrompt: Use $dev-task to draft a design and TDD plan.
Use $dev-execute to implement this plan through review gates.
Use $dev-review to review this change with dev-core criteria.
